tagline: We are in this business because we love animals!

hero.headline:
Where Your Pet Feels Right
at Home
hero.subheadline: Your pet deserves more than a kennel. At Country K9, they get five acres of freedom, climate-controlled suites, and staff who treat every tail-wagger and purr-machine like family. Relax knowing they're safe, happy, and loved.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pet Care Under<br class="hidden md:block"> One Roof
services.subtitle: From overnight boarding to full spa days, we handle every aspect of your pet's care so you can travel, work, or simply enjoy peace of mind.

cards.title: Pet Boarding
cards.description: Spacious climate-controlled suites with Kuranda raised beds and large outdoor areas. Individual attention for dogs, cats, birds, and small animals.

cards.title: Dog & Cat Grooming
cards.description: Full-service bathing and grooming by experienced professionals. Your pet leaves looking sharp, smelling fresh, and feeling fantastic.

cards.title: Dog Training
cards.description: Basic obedience classes and immersive Board & Train programs that transform behavior while your dog enjoys resort-style boarding.

cards.title: Agility Course
cards.description: Fun outdoor agility training for dogs and their owners. Build confidence, burn energy, and strengthen the bond with your best friend.

cards.title: Spa Services
cards.description: Pampering wellness treatments that go beyond grooming. Nail care, coat conditioning, and relaxation packages for the pet who deserves extra.

cards.title: Multi-Pet Packages
cards.description: Bringing the whole crew? We offer multi-pet discounts plus military and law enforcement pricing. Every member of the family is welcome.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Happy Pet Stay

steps.title: Schedule a Tour & Booking
steps.description: Call us or visit the resort. We'll show you the suites, play areas, and answer every question. Then we'll find the perfect dates for your pet's stay.

steps.title: Drop Off & Settle In
steps.description: Bring your pet with their favorite toy or blanket. Our caring staff introduces them to their suite and begins playtime to make them feel at home.

steps.title: Pick Up a Happy Pet
steps.description: Collect your well-rested, well-loved pet who's had the time of their life. Add grooming or training and they come back even better than before.

about.label: Why Pet Parents Trust Us
about.headline: Not Just a Kennel — We're Your Pet's Second Family
about.description: Family-owned and operated since 2010, Country K9 Pet Resort & Spa sits on five beautiful acres in Stephenson, Virginia — far from busy roads and traffic. We built this place because we love animals, plain and simple. Every member of our team shares that passion, and it shows in the way we care for your pets. From wagging tails at drop-off to happy reunions at pick-up, we treat every animal like our own.

features.title: 5 Acres of Safe, Open Space
features.description: Grassy play areas, a fun agility course, and separate indoor/outdoor zones so every pet gets the exercise and fresh air they need.

features.title: Climate-Controlled Suites
features.description: Premium indoor suites with raised Kuranda beds keep your pet comfortable year-round, no matter the weather outside.

features.title: All Species Welcome
features.description: Dogs, cats, birds, and small animals all have dedicated, quiet spaces designed for their specific comfort and safety.

pricing.headline: Simple, Honest Pet Care Pricing.
pricing.subtitle: Transparent rates for every service. Multi-pet and military discounts available — just ask.

guarantee.headline: Our "Happy Pet" Promise
guarantee.description: Your pet's safety, comfort, and happiness are our top priority. If you're ever not completely satisfied with any aspect of your pet's stay, we'll make it right immediately — no questions asked. That's the Country K9 promise.

faqs.question: What should I bring for my pet's boarding stay?
faqs.answer: Bring your pet's regular food (to avoid tummy upset), any medications, and a favorite toy or blanket for comfort. We provide premium Kuranda beds, fresh water, and lots of love. Vaccination records are required for all boarding guests.

faqs.question: Do you board cats and small animals too?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! We have a quiet, dedicated indoor/outdoor cattery separate from the dogs, plus accommodations for birds and small animals. Every species gets their own calm, safe space designed for their comfort.

faqs.question: What is your Board & Train program?
faqs.answer: Our Board & Train combines professional dog training with a resort boarding stay. Your dog learns obedience and addresses behavioral issues while enjoying daily playtime, comfortable suites, and individualized attention from our trainers.

faqs.question: Can I tour the facility before booking?
faqs.answer: We encourage it! Call us at (540) 667-7387 to schedule a tour. We'll walk you through the suites, play areas, grooming salon, and agility course so you can see exactly where your pet will be staying.

faqs.question: Do you offer discounts for multiple pets?
faqs.answer: Yes! We offer multi-pet discounts when you board more than one pet with us. We also provide special pricing for military and law enforcement families. Just ask when you call to book.

testimonials.name: Sarah J.
testimonials.text: Thank you so much for welcoming Moose and treating him so great while he was on his doggie vacation. We knew he was in capable, loving hands and got special attention every day.

testimonials.name: Sue C.
testimonials.text: Country K9 Pet Resort and Spa is a great kennel and grooming salon for my dog. The staff truly cares about the animals and the facility is always clean and welcoming.

testimonials.name: Rick & Donna S.
testimonials.text: Thanks for taking such good care of Chip this past year. It's wonderful knowing we can leave him somewhere safe where the staff genuinely loves animals. We wouldn't go anywhere else.

contact.subtitle: Call us or fill out the form below for a free consultation. We'll answer your questions and help you plan the perfect stay for your furry family member.
